payload.summary: 2 blockers (CSP-violating inline onerror on 2 images + JWT in localStorage), 6 majors (parseFloat on BigDecimal string, deprecated retryWhen, fragile template .replace() chain, manual pipe construction in component, console.log in production code, skeleton a11y), 5 minors, 5 nits. Design-token pipeline is correctly implemented (ADR-005 verified end-to-end). Interface contract honored — balance: string, accountId not in DOM, no FE re-sort. All 5 dashboard states tested. Estimated remediation: half-day.

findings.message: is an inline JS handler that will be blocked by strict CSP (script-src 'self'). Banking apps run under strict CSP — fallback breaks silently in production.
findings.suggested_fix: Replace with Angular (error)="onImgError($event)" event binding, or hide the entirely and rely on inline SVG fallback.

findings.message: Same inline onerror handler as R-FE-001 — CSP violation risk.
findings.suggested_fix: Replace with Angular (error) event binding.

findings.message: Guard reads JWT from localStorage (in addition to sessionStorage). Storing bearer/JWT in localStorage is an OWASP anti-pattern for banking apps — any XSS gains long-lived token access. Conflicts with the security posture of the rest of the feature (RFC 7807 errors, PII-clean copy, IBOR filter).
findings.suggested_fix: Remove the localStorage fallback. Prefer HttpOnly cookies for token storage; if session persistence across tabs is required, use a refresh-token flow rather than extending access-token lifetime via localStorage.

findings.message: Contract types `balance` as string to prevent IEEE-754 precision loss, but the pipe calls parseFloat(value) and uses the resulting number for both display and aria-label math. Pipe's own JSDoc says 'never parse to number for math operations' — implementation contradicts the comment.
findings.suggested_fix: Parse integer baht and satang directly from the string (split on '.'), format with Intl.NumberFormat on the integer part, then concatenate. Add a regression test with balance='9007199254740992.99'.

findings.message: retryWhen is deprecated in RxJS 7 and removed in RxJS 8. The attempt counter from mergeMap's index argument has fragile semantics — only works because exactly one error emits per attempt.
findings.suggested_fix: Migrate to retry({ count: 3, delay: (err, attempt) => err.status === 503 ? timer(RETRY_DELAYS_MS[attempt-1]) : throwError(()=>err) }). Add startWith({kind:'loading'}) so the loading-state test becomes non-trivial.

findings.message: balanceResult.display.replace('฿', '').replace('THB', '').trim() is a locale-fragile workaround. Intl.NumberFormat may emit 'THB 128,540.25' (en locale) or use NBSP characters that break .replace() with regular space.
findings.suggested_fix: Extend BalanceFormatResult with amountOnly: string emitted by the pipe; drop the .replace() chain from the template.

findings.message: buildAriaLabel() instantiates pipes with `new AccountTypeLabelPipe()` and `new BalanceAmountPipe()` on every account change — recreating Intl.NumberFormat each call. Also a DI violation: pipes should be injected, used in template, or replaced with pure utility functions.
findings.suggested_fix: Inject the pipes via constructor, or refactor pipe logic into pure functions, or move aria-label composition to a computed signal.

findings.message: console.log('[balance-dashboard] row selected:', account.rank) ships to production. account.rank is not PII but the eslint-disable signals the author knows this is wrong, and the next dev may reach for the full account object (which contains masked number + balance string).
findings.suggested_fix: Remove the console.log entirely. Add no-console: error eslint rule for this feature directory.

findings.message: Skeleton <li> has both role='listitem' AND aria-hidden='true'. Some screen readers still announce listitem count while suppressing content — confusing during loading.
findings.suggested_fix: Remove role='listitem' from skeleton rows. aria-busy on parent + aria-hidden on children is the correct pattern.

findings.message: Freshness union includes 'stale' but task-plan §Interface Contracts says v1 only has 'live' | 'snapshot' ('stale' is v1.1).
findings.suggested_fix: Restrict v1 Freshness to 'live' | 'snapshot', or amend task-plan + OpenAPI to admit 'stale' now. Coordinate with TL.

findings.message: 'loading$ state transitions' test passes trivially because the service never emits a loading state.
findings.suggested_fix: After R-FE-005 (startWith loading), this becomes meaningful. Until then, rename to reflect reality.

findings.message: Feature is standalone, yet wrapped in NgModule + RouterModule.forChild(). app.routes.ts uses loadChildren on the module, then the module re-loads the component lazily. Double-lazy + boilerplate.
findings.suggested_fix: Either go full standalone (drop the module, expose BALANCE_ROUTES) or skip the inner lazy load.

findings.message: Fallback SVG uses stroke='var(--color-primary-300)' in SVG presentation attribute — works in modern browsers but not all renderers, and bypasses currentColor pattern used elsewhere.
findings.suggested_fix: Use stroke='currentColor' + set color via CSS on parent container (mirrors account-row pattern).

findings.message: require('@angular/router').Router and require('rxjs').Subject mix CJS with ESM imports — inconsistent, may trip strict-mode builds.
findings.suggested_fix: Use ESM imports at file top.

findings.message: Hardcoded cubic-bezier(0.2, 0, 0, 1) — token --motion-easing-standard has this exact value.
findings.suggested_fix: Replace literal with var(--motion-easing-standard) (also stale-banner, stale-badge, error-retry-banner).

findings.message: border-left: 4px solid … hardcodes width. No --border-width-4 token exists.
findings.suggested_fix: Add a token (--border-width-banner-rule: 4px) or document the intentional non-tokenized value.

findings.message: background: rgba(120, 53, 15, 0.05) hand-derived from --color-semantic-warning-on-tint. Breaks dark-mode swap.
findings.suggested_fix: Use color-mix(in srgb, var(--color-semantic-warning-on-tint) 5%, transparent) or define --color-warning-hover token.

findings.message: <li role='listitem'> — <li> already has implicit role='listitem'.
findings.suggested_fix: Remove explicit role='listitem' from <li>.

findings.message: @Output() rowSelect is emitted but the page handler only console.logs (R-FE-008). Either fully wire or remove until v1.1.
findings.suggested_fix: Remove rowSelect output and the <button> interactivity until detail page is implemented, OR navigate to a placeholder route.

findings.message: Hardcoded 2 Tab presses to reach first account row — breaks silently if any focusable is added before the list.
findings.suggested_fix: Tab in a loop until focused element matches selector, or focus directly and assert via document.activeElement.
